# Acme Design System

> A multi-brand design system with tokenized theming for React.

## Overview

- [Getting Started](../docs/getting-started.md): Setup, install, basic usage
- [Figma](../figma.md): Component library file (Foundations + one page per component)
- [Tokens](../docs/tokens.md): Design token architecture (primitive → semantic → component)
- [Theming](../docs/theming.md): How brand themes work, how to add a new brand

## Components

- [Button](../docs/components/button.md): Primary, secondary, destructive variants
- [Card](../docs/components/card.md): Surface container with padding and radius
- [Input](../docs/components/input.md): Text input with label, error, disabled states
- [Badge](../docs/components/badge.md): Status indicators

## Verification

- [AI agent test checklist](../docs/verification.md): Prove the pipeline works

## For AI Agents

- [llms-full.txt](../llms-full.txt): Complete component reference in one file
